Unknown

Unknown

Unknown

============================================================
DATA CONFIDENCE NOTES
============================================================

High Confidence

• MachineDex ID
• Machine name
• ACRA brand marking
• Machine type
• ToAuto DRO-3Axis marking
• 3-axis DRO display
• Visible spindle speed range
• Visible warning not to change RPM without motor running
• Overall machine photo reference
• Controls photo references
• Tooling photo reference
• Product photo reference

Medium Confidence

• Formal name
  The formal name is assembled from visible ACRA branding, vertical knee mill
  configuration, and variable-speed head markings.

Low Confidence / Unknown

• Exact model number
• Serial number
• Exact manufacture year
• X-axis travel
• Y-axis travel
• Z-axis travel
• Table size
• Spindle taper
• Quill travel
• Knee travel
• Motor horsepower
• Electrical requirements
• Machine weight
• Overall dimensions

============================================================
REVISION HISTORY
============================================================

2026-07-02
Initial MachineDex Master Card Created.
Specifications and identification data extracted by ChatGPT from visible machine photos.
